mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, role, driver_status) VALUES ( lower(#{email}), #{passwordHash}, #{role},
'OFFLINE'
NULL
)
mapper.select: SELECT id, email, password_hash, role, driver_status, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE lower(email) = lower(#{email})
SELECT id, email, password_hash, role, driver_status, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE id = #{id}::uuid
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET driver_status = #{driverStatus}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{id}::uuid
